summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. This shard has no shared canonical; open non-security PRs are kept independent for maintainer review, and security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling. No GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Independent open PR with its own review path; do not close, merge, or link to a shared canonical in this inventory shard.
Independent open PR for a hydrated issue; keep for maintainer review rather than close or merge in plan mode.
Security-boundary media allowlist change with a private-key-shaped review finding is out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup.
Independent script/infrastructure PR with unresolved review feedback; keep open for its own author/maintainer path.
Independent open media bugfix PR; no duplicate or closure basis in this inventory shard.
Independent open Mattermost fix PR with its own linked issue and review path; keep open rather than close or merge.
Independent open WebChat replay PR; competing unhydrated work is evidence only, not a basis for closure in this shard.
Independent open capability PR needing its own maintainer/config compatibility review; no closure or merge action is allowed.
Independent small docs/CLI clarification PR; keep open for maintainer review rather than close or merge.
Broad authenticated inbound webhook and Gateway control-plane work is security-sensitive and must go to central OpenClaw security handling.
